items.title: Vinson & Elkins Represents JPMorgan Chase & Co. in $450 Million Thermoplastics Divestiture
items.description: By Karen Roman Vinson & Elkins said it represented JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) as financial advisor to The Saudi Basic Industries Corporation in the $450 million sale of its regional engineering thermoplastics business in the Americas and Europe to MUTARES. The Saudi Basic Corp. produces polycarbonate, polybutylene terephthalate and other resin and compounds […]
